message:
feat(parser): add ES2020 destructuring patterns, expand parser coverage, refine static semantics

AST (ast.rs, +367 lines):
- Add BindingPattern enum with Identifier, ObjectPattern, ArrayPattern,
  Rest, and AssignmentPattern variants for full ES2020 destructuring
- Add ObjectPatternProperty struct with computed/shorthand support
- Implement Display, canonical_value(), binding_names() for all pattern types
- Migrate VariableDeclarator from `name: String` to `pattern: BindingPattern`
  with backward-compatible name() accessor

Parser (parser.rs, +447 lines):
- Implement parse_binding_pattern(), parse_object_pattern(),
  parse_array_pattern() for destructuring in var/let/const declarations
- Expand expression parsing: ternary/conditional, comma expressions,
  tagged template literals, optional chaining (?.)
- Add parse_for_in_of() for for-in/for-of loop variants
- Improve operator precedence handling and associativity

Static Semantics (static_semantics.rs, refactored ~330 lines):
- Adapt scope analysis and variable resolution to work with
  BindingPattern instead of plain string names
- Handle destructured bindings in lexical scope registration
- Expand type narrowing and flow-sensitive analysis

Lowering Pipeline (lowering_pipeline.rs, +183 lines):
- Lower destructuring patterns to flat assignment sequences
- Handle nested object/array patterns with default values
- Expand statement lowering coverage for new AST variants

Supporting modules:
- flow_lattice.rs: Extend lattice operations for pattern-derived types
- specialization_conformance.rs: Add destructuring conformance checks
- migration_compatibility.rs: Forward-compat shims for pattern migration
- parallel_parser.rs, parser_arena.rs, parser_error_recovery.rs,
  module_resolver.rs: Minor adjustments for new AST types

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
